## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `test-spec.md` updated (if new tests)
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage` passes (100%)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) for user-facing changes
